services.name: Luxe Brows
services.description: Enjoy expert brow threading and shaping designed to enhance your natural features.

services.name: Teen Brows
services.description: Receive the same professional threading and shaping as our Luxe Brows, specifically tailored for teens.

services.name: Luxe Facial Touch-Up Threading/Waxing
services.description: Choose one area for targeted threading/waxing: upper lip, chin, cheeks, sideburns, forehead, or neck.

services.name: Luxe Brows & One Area Facial Touch-Up Threading/Waxing
services.description: Combine Luxe Brows with threading/waxing of one additional area of your choice (upper lip, chin, cheeks, sideburns, forehead, or neck).

services.name: Luxe Brows & Two Area Facial Touch-Up Threading/Waxing
services.description: Combine Luxe Brows with threading/waxing of any two additional areas of your choice (upper lip, chin, cheeks, sideburns, forehead, or neck).

services.name: The Luxe Smooth Face
services.description: Indulge in a complete facial de-fuzzing from the neck upward for a silky, flawless finish. Brows are refined with our signature luxe technique, and the treatment concludes with a complimentary smoothing facial massage.

services.name: Luxe Brow Tint
services.description: A semi-permanent tint accentuates natural brow hairs, giving a fuller, more defined look that lasts up to 4–6 weeks.

services.name: Luxe Lash Tint
services.description: This waterproof, smudge-proof, and clump-free formula lasts up to 6 weeks—ideal for vacations, workouts, and contact lens wearers.

services.name: Henna Luxe Brows
services.description: A gentle, long-lasting tint enhances your natural brows by colouring both hair and skin for a fuller, defined look. Results last 4–6 weeks on brow hairs and 1–2 weeks on the skin.

services.name: Luxe Lash Lift
services.description: Lift and curl your natural lashes—no extensions, falsies, or mascara required. Results last up to 6–8 weeks with no maintenance or removal needed.

services.name: Luxe Brow Lamination
services.description: The ultimate brow service, combining shaping, 3D tint, and lamination for a lifted, full, and sleek appearance that remains flawless for up to 6–8 weeks.

services.name: 10-minute Luxe Glow & Go
services.description: Experience a gold-finished massage wand and organic facial oil to boost circulation, restore radiance, and create a calming ritual for your skin and soul.

services.name: Eye Renewal Mask
services.description: Nourishing botanicals refresh and restore, delivering deep hydration, visible plumping, and a youthful glow while easing puffiness and fatigue.

services.name: Brow Prep & Polish
services.description: Refresh your brows and skin for an enhanced glow and improved results from your favourite brow treatments.

services.name: Luxe Brows & Tinting Package
services.description: Save with this bundle of luxe brow threading and brow tinting.

services.name: Luxe Brows & Tinting + 1 Luxe Facial Touch-Up Threading/Waxing
services.description: Save with this combination of luxe brow threading, tinting, and one signature threading area.

services.name: Luxe Brows & Tinting + 2 Luxe Facial Touch-Up Threading/Waxing
services.description: Save with a package that includes luxe brow threading, tinting, and two signature threading areas.

services.name: Luxe Brows + Brow Tinting + Lash Tint Bundle
services.description: Enjoy luxe brow threading, brow tinting, and lash tinting together in this value package.

services.name: Luxe Lash Lift + Lash Tint Bundle
services.description: Combine lash lift and lash tinting for long-lasting, beautiful lashes.

services.name: Luxe Brows + Brow Henna
services.description: Bundle luxe brow threading and brow henna for enhanced, defined brows.

services.name: Brow Lamination + Luxe Lash Lift Bundle
services.description: Get both brow lamination and a luxe lash lift for a complete eye enhancement experience.

services.name: Men's Unibrow
services.description: Threading and clean-up between the brows for a polished look.

services.name: Men's Luxe Brows
services.description: A comprehensive brow service for men, including trimming, shaping, threading, a soothing brow massage, and a personalized consultation.

services.name: Men's Cheeks + Forehead or Ears
services.description: Threading and clean-up for both cheeks, plus your choice of either the forehead or the area around the ears.

services.name: Luxe Express Facial
services.description: A quick, 30-minute facial that cleanses, exfoliates, and revitalizes your skin, finished with a soothing mask and complimentary facial massage. Extractions are not included.

services.name: Purely Yours Facial
services.description: Enjoy a custom facial tailored to your skin's unique needs. Your specialist selects the perfect combination of cleansers, exfoliators, toners, masks, and moisturizers. Includes extractions for a total refresh.

services.name: Coconut Glow Hydrating Facial
services.description: This antioxidant-rich, organic facial uses coconut to nourish and firm the skin, restoring a youthful texture and a glowing complexion. Extractions are included.

services.name: Delicate Care Facial
services.description: A gentle, restorative treatment designed to calm, comfort, and strengthen sensitive skin with soothing botanicals and hydrating ingredients. Reduces redness and leaves your complexion soft, balanced, and refreshed. Extractions are included.

services.name: Organic Pregnancy Facial
services.description: Our Organic Pregnancy Facial is a calming, customized treatment created to support the unique skincare needs of pregnancy. Using only organic, toxin-free, and pregnancy-safe products, this facial helps relieve dryness, sensitivity, and hormonal breakouts while restoring a healthy glow.

services.name: Éminence Ashwagandha Facial
services.description: The Éminence Ashwagandha Facial is a deeply restorative treatment designed to combat the visible effects of stress, fatigue, and environmental damage. Powered by Éminence's Adaptogenic Herbal Complex—including ashwagandha, reishi mushroom, and rhodiola—this facial helps strengthen the skin barrier, improve resilience, and restore a healthy, radiant glow.

services.name: Lip Revival Facial
services.description: Enriched with citrus and pineapple enzymes, this treatment smooths dryness, softens fine lines, deeply hydrates, and helps boost collagen for fuller, healthier-looking lips.

services.name: Booster
services.description: Let our estheticians select booster serums, concentrates, and oils to penetrate deeply and deliver optimal skin results.

services.name: De-Puff & Eye Brightening
services.description: Hydrating ingredients soothe and revitalize tired eyes, reducing puffiness, dark circles, and fatigue while supporting circulation and lymphatic drainage for a refreshed look.

services.name: Full Legs
services.description: Professional waxing service for full legs, providing smooth, long-lasting results.

services.name: Upper Legs
services.description: Waxing service for upper legs only, perfect for targeted hair removal.

services.name: Lower Legs
services.description: Waxing service for lower legs, from knees to ankles.

services.name: Full Arms
services.description: Complete arm waxing from shoulders to wrists for smooth, hair-free arms.

services.name: Half Arms
services.description: Waxing service for lower arms, from elbows to wrists.

services.name: Under Arms
services.description: Gentle underarm waxing for a clean, smooth finish.

services.name: Stomach
services.description: Professional stomach waxing for smooth, hair-free skin.

services.name: Breast
services.description: Gentle and discreet breast area waxing service.

services.name: Full Back
services.description: Complete back waxing service for a smooth, clean appearance.

services.name: Half Back
services.description: Waxing service for upper or lower back area.

services.name: Bikini Line
services.description: Basic bikini line waxing for a clean, neat appearance.

services.name: French Bikini
services.description: More extensive than a standard bikini line, leaving a small strip.

services.name: Brazilian
services.description: Complete hair removal in the bikini area for the smoothest finish.

services.name: Buttocks
services.description: Professional waxing service for the buttocks area.

services.name: Butt Cheeks
services.description: Targeted waxing service for butt cheeks only.

services.name: Fingers/Toes
services.description: Quick waxing service for fingers and toes.

services.name: Chest/Stomach
services.description: Comprehensive chest and stomach waxing for a smooth, well-groomed look with lasting results.

services.name: Micro-Needling
services.description: Experience advanced skin rejuvenation with our professional micro-needling treatment. This minimally invasive procedure stimulates collagen production, reduces fine lines and wrinkles, improves skin texture, and diminishes the appearance of scars and pores.

services.name: Makeup
services.description: Get professionally done makeup for any occasion. Our expert makeup artists create flawless looks tailored to your style, whether it's for a special event, photoshoot, or everyday glamour.

services.name: Hair Style
services.description: Transform your look with our professional hairstyling services. From elegant updos to flowing curls, our stylists create beautiful hairstyles perfect for weddings, parties, or special occasions.

services.name: Eye Makeup
services.description: Enhance your eyes with our specialized eye makeup service. Perfect for those who want to focus on creating stunning eye looks with professional techniques and premium products.

services.name: Eye Makeup with Lashes
services.description: Complete your eye look with our eye makeup and lash application service. Includes professional eye makeup application plus false lashes for a dramatic, glamorous finish.

services.name: Saree Tie
services.description: Expert saree draping service for a perfect, elegant look. Our professionals ensure your saree is draped beautifully with clean pleats and perfect fall, ready for any occasion.
